title: [InstCombine] Fold `icmp eq/ne (X *nw Z), (Y *nw Z) -> icmp eq/ne Z, 0` when `X != Y`

tests.source_program:
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_i32_width(i32 %a, i32 %c) {
entry:
  %b = add i32 %a, 1
  %mul1 = mul nsw i32 %a, %c
  %mul2 = mul nsw i32 %b, %c
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i1 %cmp
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples only demonstrate i8 integer width; i32 width is not explicitly covered though the patch supports arbitrary integer types

alive2.src:
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_i32_width(i32 %a, i32 %c) {
entry:
  %b = add i32 %a, 1
  %mul1 = mul nsw i32 %a, %c
  %mul2 = mul nsw i32 %b, %c
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i1 %cmp
}
alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_i32_width(i32 %a, i32 %c) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %c, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_i32_width(i32 %a, i32 %c) {
entry:
  %b = add i32 %a, 1
  %mul1 = mul nsw i32 %a, %c
  %mul2 = mul nsw i32 %b, %c
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_i32_width(i32 %a, i32 %c) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp eq i32 %c, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.source_program:
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nuw_constant_xy(i16 %c) {
entry:
  %mul1 = mul nuw i16 5, %c
  %mul2 = mul nuw i16 7, %c
  %cmp = icmp eq i16 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i1 %cmp
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary shows variable X/Y comparisons; constant operand cases where X != Y is trivially known are not explicitly demonstrated

tests.source_program:
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_z_known_lowbit(i8 %a, i8 %c) {
entry:
  %b = add i8 %a, 1
  %z = or i8 %c, 1
  %mul1 = mul nsw i8 %a, %z
  %mul2 = mul nsw i8 %b, %z
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %mul1, %mul2
  ret i1 %cmp
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions known bits analysis generally but doesn't cover specific bit pattern cases where Z has known low bits set via or instruction

alive2.src:
define i1 @icmp_eq_mul_nsw_z_known_lowbit(i8 %a, i8 %c) {
entry:

  %z = or i8 %c, 1
  %mul1 = mul nsw i8 %a, %z
  %mul2 = mul nsw i8 %b, %z
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %mul1, %mul2
